metadata.description: A team of 8 AI security specialists embedded in your coding workflow — covering every phase of the Secure SDLC from requirements to release gating.

plugins.name: secure-sdlc-agents
plugins.description: 8 AI security specialist agents for the full Secure SDLC: threat modelling, AppSec, GRC, IaC review, AI/LLM security, and release gating. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP-compatible tool.
